parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response's next_page.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Sort direction for results, ordered by created_at. Defaults to asc (chronological).
parameters.name: order

400.description: Invalid argument - The client specified an invalid argument

401.description: Unauthenticated - The request does not have valid authentication credentials

403.description: Permission denied - The caller does not have permission to execute the specified operation

404.description: Not found - Some requested entity was not found

408.description: Deadline exceeded - The deadline expired before the operation could complete

409.description: Aborted - The operation was aborted due to concurrency issue

412.description: Failed precondition - Operation was rejected because the system is not in required state

413.description: Out of range - Operation was attempted past the valid range

429.description: Resource exhausted - Some resource has been exhausted (rate limiting)

431.description: Request header fields too large - Request metadata was too large

499.description: Cancelled - The operation was cancelled by the client

501.description: Unimplemented - The operation is not implemented or supported

503.description: Unavailable - The service is currently unavailable

504.description: Deadline exceeded - Upstream service did not respond in time

BetaManagedAgentsListSessionEvents.description: Paginated list of events for a `session`.

content.text: Let me look up order #1234 for you.

data.description: Events for the session, ordered by `created_at`.

content.text: Let me look up order #1234 for you.

next_page.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. Null when no more results.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEvent.description: Union type for all event types in a session.

BetaManagedAgentsUserMessageEvent.description: A user message event in the session conversation.

content.description: Array of content blocks comprising the user message.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when the agent finished processing this message.

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent.description: An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when the interrupt was processed.

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEve.description: A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

deny_message.description: Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when the confirmation was processed.

tool_use_id.description: The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEve.description: Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

content.description: The result content returned by the tool.

custom_tool_use_id.description: The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/beta/sessions/events/list#beta_managed_agents_session_requires_action.event_ids) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

is_error.description: Whether the tool execution resulted in an error.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when this result was processed.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent.description: Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

input.description: Input parameters for the tool call.

name.description: Name of the custom tool being called.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when this tool use was processed.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentMessageEvent.description: An agent response event in the session conversation.

content.text: Let me look up order #1234 for you.

content.description: Array of text blocks comprising the agent response.

examples.text: Let me look up order #1234 for you.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when this response was generated.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentThinkingEvent.description: Indicates the agent is making forward progress via extended thinking. A progress signal, not a content carrier.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when this thinking was produced.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentMcpToolUseEvent.description: Event emitted when the agent invokes a tool provided by an MCP server.

evaluated_permission.description: The evaluated permission policy for this tool invocation.

input.description: Input parameters for the tool call.

mcp_server_name.description: Name of the MCP server providing the tool.

name.description: Name of the MCP tool being used.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when this event was processed.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentMcpToolResultEvent.description: Event representing the result of an MCP tool execution.

content.description: The result content returned by the tool.

is_error.description: Whether the tool execution resulted in an error.

mcp_tool_use_id.description: The id of the `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when this event was processed.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEvent.description: Event emitted when the agent invokes a built-in agent tool.

evaluated_permission.description: The evaluated permission policy for this tool invocation.

input.description: Input parameters for the tool call.

name.description: Name of the agent tool being used.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when this event was processed.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolResultEvent.description: Event representing the result of an agent tool execution.

content.description: The result content returned by the tool.

is_error.description: Whether the tool execution resulted in an error.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when this event was processed.

tool_use_id.description: The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentThreadContextCompa.description: Indicates that context compaction (summarization) occurred during the session.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when compaction was processed.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent.description: An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when the error occurred.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusReschedule.description: Indicates the session is recovering from an error state and is rescheduled for execution.

processed_at.description: Timestamp of status change.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusRunningEve.description: Indicates the session is actively running and the agent is working.

processed_at.description: Timestamp of status change.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusIdleEvent.description: Indicates the agent has paused and is awaiting user input.

processed_at.description: Timestamp of status change.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusTerminated.description: Indicates the session has terminated, either due to an error or completion.

processed_at.description: Timestamp of status change.

BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestStartEv.description: Emitted when a model request is initiated by the agent.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when the model request started.

BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestEndEven.description: Emitted when a model request completes.

is_error.description: Whether the model request resulted in an error.

model_request_start_id.description: The id of the corresponding `span.model_request_start` event.

model_usage.description: Token usage for this model request.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when the model request completed.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionDeletedEvent.description: Emitted when a session has been deleted. Terminates any active event stream — no further events will be emitted for this session.

processed_at.description: Timestamp when the session was deleted.

BetaManagedAgentsUserContentBlock.description: Content block in a user message. Can be `text`, `image`, or `document`.

BetaManagedAgentsToolResultContentBlock.description: Content block in a tool result. Can be `text`, `image`, `document`, or `search_result`.

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError.description: An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

retry_status.description: What the client should do next.

BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError.description: The model is currently overloaded. Emitted after automatic retries are exhausted.

retry_status.description: What the client should do next.
What the client should do next.

BetaManagedAgentsModelRequestFailedError.description: A model request failed for a reason other than overload or rate-limiting.

retry_status.description: What the client should do next.

BetaManagedAgentsMcpConnectionFailedErro.description: Failed to connect to an MCP server.

mcp_server_name.description: Name of the MCP server that failed to connect.

retry_status.description: What the client should do next.

BetaManagedAgentsMcpAuthenticationFailed.description: Authentication to an MCP server failed.

mcp_server_name.description: Name of the MCP server that failed authentication.

retry_status.description: What the client should do next.

BetaManagedAgentsBillingError.description: The caller's organization or workspace cannot make model requests — out of credits or spend limit reached. Retrying with the same credentials will not succeed; the caller must resolve the billing state.

retry_status.description: What the client should do next.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn.description: The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction.description: The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event_ids.description: The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted.description: The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage.description: Token usage for a single model request.

cache_creation_input_tokens.description: Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache_read_input_tokens.description: Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input_tokens.description: Input tokens consumed by this request.

output_tokens.description: Output tokens generated by this request.

speed.description: Inference speed tier this request actually ran at. Mirrors `usage.speed` on /v1/messages. Only present when the fast-mode beta is active.

BetaManagedAgentsImageBlock.description: Image content specified directly as base64 data or as a reference via a URL.

source.description: The source of the image data.

BetaManagedAgentsDocumentBlock.description: Document content, either specified directly as base64 data, as text, or as a reference via a URL.

context.description: Additional context about the document for the model.

source.description: The source of the document data.

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatus.description: What the client should do next in response to this error.

BetaManagedAgentsSpeed.description: Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

BetaManagedAgentsImageSource.description: Union type for image source variants.

BetaManagedAgentsDocumentSource.description: Union type for document source variants.

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying.description: The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted.description: This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal.description: The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

url.description: URL of the image to fetch.

file_id.description: ID of a previously uploaded file.

media_type.description: MIME type of the text content. Must be "text/plain".

url.description: URL of the document to fetch.

file_id.description: ID of a previously uploaded file.
